race.description: Ladbrokes Inter Dominion Pacing Champs Ht3 (L)
race.comment: A thrilling early clash between the two series favourites but it's hard to go past local pin-up boy LEAP TO FAME (5). He took his record at this circuit and distance to 20 from 22 when holding off The Janitor in their final lead-up run and unlike that occasion he draws inside that rival tonight. He is on a six-race winning streak that includes the Miracle Mile and The Race in NZ and he is yet to be defeated through two Inter Dominion series. Doubt that will change here. THE JANITOR NZ (6) was only a neck off LEAP TO FAME in their lead-up, the third time he has pushed the champ in four clashes. His draw outside Leap To Fame won't make it easy to turn the tables but his turn will come soon. DANGEROUS (8) has joined Jason Grimson since last seen. Won a heat of this series in 2024 and a trial win in blistering time suggests he is ready to make an impact again. UBETCHA TIGERPIE (2) has recorded a string of strong efforts from wider or second row barriers. Include from this favourable draw.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 Ladbrokes QLD Constellations Carnival - Prize Money: $40,000
